name: kubernetes-mastery
description: Reason about, author, and safely operate Kubernetes. Three skills: concepts (the founder/company mental model), authoring (failure-mode-first manifest design and review), and operating (read-only-by-default live-cluster triage). Grounded in official Kubernetes docs, the NSA/CISA Hardening Guide, OWASP Kubernetes Top 10, Pod Security Standards, and the CIS Benchmark.
